rules.journeyTargetScore: Points to win the match (0: a single hand)
rules.journeyStackHazards: Stack hazards on an already stopped rival
rules.journeyAllImmunitiesBonus: Bonus for playing all four immunities

cards.semaforo_played_self: You plant a red light on {{target}}!
cards.semaforo_played_victim: {{player}} plants a red light on you! Hit the brakes
cards.semaforo_played_victim_team: {{player}} plants a red light on your team! Hit the brakes
cards.limite_played_self: You throw a speed limit at {{target}}!
cards.limite_played_victim: {{player}} throws a speed limit at you! Turtle mode engaged!
cards.limite_played_victim_team: {{player}} throws a speed limit at your team! Turtle mode engaged!
cards.sin_gasolina_played_victim: {{player}} drains your tank! Out of fuel: start pushing
cards.sin_gasolina_played_victim_team: {{player}} drains your team's tank! Out of fuel: start pushing
cards.accidente_played_victim_team: Crash! {{player}} causes your team an accident!
cards.reparacion_played_self: You take your {{token}} to the workshop
cards.prioridad_played_self: You play the Right of way!
cards.cisterna_played_self: You hook up the Tanker truck!
